name: WLED RGB Effect Mode

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B40119E9-7D0A-47D2-A0EE-FA5D19739E74

comment:
WLED RGB Effect Mode with subfixtures: Fixture for controlling LED systems using the awesome open source WLED project. Based off v16.

-community GDTF, not affiliated with the WLED project-

15-channel Effect mode per https://kno.wled.ge/interfaces/e1.31-dmx. 
Effect names from https://kno.wled.ge/features/effects/ (incl. v16 table). 
IDs [48, 53, 114, 142, 169, 170, 171] are not listed there and use Unlisted_ID_nnn. 
Built-in palette labels from https://kno.wled.ge/features/palettes/ (IDs 0-70); DMX channel 5 matches palette ID; DMX 71-255 are grouped as Custom_or_Undefined (custom uploads etc.). 
Wheel slot names use Annex C Table C1-safe prefixes 2D_ / AUD_ / 2DAUD_ from the Flags column.
DMX channel 2 is one effect-ID byte (0-219); one wheel lists all effects in ID order (required so logical channels do not overlap on the same DMX address). 
Primary RGB on beam Primary; Secondary/Tertiary RGB on subfixture geometries. 
Requires WLED 0.14+ effect DMX layout. Not realtime; single universe.
